calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas DiFranco for and with (executor/petitioner) Charles Carroll.

The court asked if there was anything additional Mr. DiFranco would like to explain or if he would like to file a declaration. Mr. DiFranco addressed the examiner's notes explaining that he worked on the statement of interest as it was evidence to support the petition, that they were witnesses that had information regarding the decedents wishes, that Mr. Carroll had filed a petition for determination, that subsequently the law changed and he needed to file an additional petition, that the court granted the second petition so that he could participate, that there were questions raised by the examiner and a 2nd amended petition was filed and more questions from the examiner and a declaration was filed. Mr. DiFranco further stated that this was not a simple estate, that the will was ambiguous, that designations were not done, explained the tax issues, stated that the apartment needed to be closed that distribution of non-value items out of the apartment was made, that the debts have been paid and that there have been no royalty payments since the death of the decedent. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Park. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Petition Of Personal Representative For Authorization To Participate, As Necessary To Assist The Court In The Petition For Interpretation Of The Will & Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Di Franco for Petitioner.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to incorporating the terms of the document titled "Valic Beneficiaries" dated March 12, 2012 into the Will. The Petition for Authorization to Participate, etc. and the Petition for Interpretation of Will, etc. were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
